name: AD Mixtape · West Indies Christmas (A Mixtape)
description: The holidays, West Indies style. With the expansion of record distribution from the UK, the US, and Canada during the 1960s, Christmas music experienced a notable surge, mirroring developments in Jamaica. The following twenty track all vinyl mixtape covers most of that time period, from the early 60s through the late 70s.
